name: Drakmari
description: The Drakmari are apex predators from the crushing deep-ocean trenches of a high-gravity water world, possessing bioluminescent skin, layered pressure-resistant anatomy, and an instinct for ambush that transferred seamlessly to naval combat. Reaching space required solving pressure engineering in reverse — not keeping pressure out, but learning to live without it — and the Drakmari did so with characteristic aggression, experimenting until it worked. Their fleets are fast, vicious, and alarmingly good at finding the weak points in an enemy formation.
